project_name: Automated Platform for Product Launch & Store Unlisting

user_roles.description: Responsible for all product listing and delisting operations, handling the entire process single-handedly

pain_points.job: Receive product update instructions from headquarters and enter into Saleor
pain_points.current_solution: Manually read Excel files and enter data one by one in the Saleor backend
pain_points.pain: Product information arrives in batches, requiring multiple listing rounds and 2–10 back-and-forth communications

pain_points.current_solution: Log into the official website and search for each product individually
pain_points.pain: Verifying 20 products one by one via search is time-consuming
Pure repetitive work, prone to errors, requiring multiple checks

pain_points.current_solution: Log into the Saleor backend separately for each store and perform actions one by one
pain_points.pain: No batch operations; repeated logins across multiple stores for each unlisting
No audit trail throughout the process; headquarters cannot track progress in real time

pain_points.job: Receive supplementary product information from headquarters
pain_points.current_solution: Wait for emails and merge data manually
pain_points.pain: Entire process relies entirely on one person, creating single point of failure risk

requirements.feature: Automatically parse Excel files from headquarters and sync directly to Saleor
requirements.source_quote: There are many back-and-forths, and we need to verify final product count and data accuracy

requirements.feature: Draft mode: save incomplete information temporarily, publish in one click once complete
requirements.source_quote: Enter available information first, then publish all at once at the scheduled time after full details are provided
Store unlisting also requires logging into the Saleor backend one by one

requirements.feature: Auto-verify product visibility on the official website after publishing, replacing manual search checks
Retain full audit logs for all operations, supporting traceability and reporting to headquarters
Email polling: automatically detect emails with subject containing [Product Update] and download attachments
requirements.source_quote: Need to switch to email polling

requirements.feature: Automatically append replies from the same email thread (Thread-ID) to existing draft tasks
requirements.source_quote: These are reply emails, follow-up emails

success_metrics: Operations Specialist fully relieved from product launch / delisting workflows
Single product launch task processing time reduced from 1 day–1 week to under 30 minutes
Manual interventions reduced from an average of 5 to 0 (in normal flow)
open_questions: Is there a fixed Excel template, or does headquarters use different formats each time?
What is the maximum number of stores per task? (Affects unlisting concurrency strategy)

technical_constraints.saleor_bulk_takedown: No bulk unlisting API; individual API calls must be made in a loop
technical_constraints.email_thread_matching: Same Thread-ID grouped into one task; new subject creates new task

summary: A single operations staff member manages the entire product listing and delisting process, relying fully on manual Excel entry and Saleor operations. The workflow takes 1 day to 1 week with 2–10 rounds of communication. Core pain points are repetitive data entry and repeated verification. The goal is full automation from email receipt to results reporting, fully freeing the operations specialist. Saleor supports bulk creation (ProductBulkCreate) but not bulk unlisting (requires looped individual API calls).
